item.title: Preemptive Cybersecurity Resources | PreCrime by BforeAI
item.description: Explore research, case studies, and webinars explaining how preemptive cyber defense works. Contact our team for a product demo.

item.title: News - BforeAI
item.description: Explore our news page for the latest media coverage, interviews, and company insights, along with an extensive archive of featured stories and press highlights.

item.title: Blog - BforeAI
item.description: Dive into a wealth of blog insights designed to stay updated on industry trends, expert opinions, and company news.

item.title: Datasheets - BforeAI
item.description: Explore our datasheets for concise, in-depth information on BforeAI products, features, and technical capabilities.

item.title: Case Studies - BforeAI
item.description: Explore our case studies to see how real-world challenges were solved through our innovative approaches, delivering measurable results and lasting value for our clients.

item.title: E-Books - BforeAI
item.description: Explore our collection of published e-books, packed with in-depth knowledge, expert advice, and practical insights across a wide range of topics – all designed to keep you informed and one step ahead.

item.title: Reports - BforeAI
item.description: Explore our latest PreCrime Labs reports for in-depth analyses, data-driven insights, and timely research that help you stay ahead of key trends and developments in predictive security.

item.title: Videos - BforeAI
item.description: Here, you can watch a curated selection of videos showcasing our products, expert insights, and success stories.

item.title: NFT Brand Impersonation Scams - BforeAI
item.description: NFTs and Web3 are challenging known and traditional notions of ownership and control in our digital landscape.

item.title: The King, The Knight, & The Snowball - BforeAI
item.description: There is no better experience than sharing something. This book is intended for us who work in security to share among those we care about. To gift ourselves a moment together.

item.title: [SCAM ALERT 072] - Banco Ciudad - BforeAI
item.description: Banco Ciudad is a municipal commercial bank in Buenos Aires, Argentina. Its main purpose was fighting usury in the city by giving loans at a below-market interest, in order to reduce social inequalities.

item.title: [Brand Impersonation] - Interactive Brokers - BforeAI
item.description: Interactive Brokers LLC is an American multinational brokerage firm. It operates the largest electronic trading platform in the U.S. by number of daily average revenue trades. The company brokers stocks, options, futures, EFPs, futures options, forex, bonds, funds, and some cryptocurrencies.

item.title: AI in Brand Impersonation - BforeAI
item.description: A tactic that threat actors are starting to employ more in their malicious efforts is the use of multiple attack vectors, meaning that they’re not just sending a phishing email, but also engaging you in a fake phone call and providing you with a brand impersonated website.

item.title: [Brand Impersonation] - Bank of Ireland - BforeAI
item.description: Bank of Ireland Group is one of the largest financial services groups in Ireland and provides a broad range of banking and other financial services.

item.title: [Brand Impersonation] - Citizens Bank - BforeAI
item.description: Citizens Financial Group, Inc. is an American bank headquartered in Providence, Rhode Island, which operates in 14 U.S. states.

item.title: Brand Impersonated Search Engine Advertisements - BforeAI
item.description: For years threat actors have used social engineering (SE) techniques to trick victims into revealing personal sensitive information for identity and monetary theft.

item.title: How To Prevent Online Brand Impersonation Scams - BforeAI
item.description: Brand impersonation scams put sensitive information at risk, damage your brand’s reputation, and erode customer trust. Contact BforeAI to learn how we can help.

item.title: Advisory: Toll Tag Malicious Infrastructure Alert - BforeAI
item.description: This report investigates a phishing campaign targeting various government agencies and services, specifically focusing on toll road payment systems such as

item.title: Job Recruitment Impersonation Scams - BforeAI
item.description: Job recruitment scams occur when threat actors reach out to victims through different online messaging platforms from seemingly reputable organisations offering victims a well-paid job opportunity with minimal work.

item.title: Don’t Fall for the Trap: Protect Yourself from Malicious Domains and Brand Attacks - BforeAI
item.description: While many assume phishing attacks are solely related to email, this is untrue. Attackers frequently use social media, malicious ads, and fake domains in an attempt to phish information out of consumers.

item.title: Quad9 and BforeAI Expand Strategic Partnership to Supercharge Preemptive Threat Intelligence - BforeAI
item.description: In a step forward for global cybersecurity, Quad9 and BforeAI are expanding our strategic partnership to accelerate protection against cyber attacks before they occur.

item.title: BforeAI Named Tech Innovator in Preemptive Cybersecurity
item.description: BforeAI recognized by Gartner as a tech innovator for its PreCrime predictive cybersecurity, shifting defense from reactive to preemptive threat intelligence.

item.title: BforeAI 2025 Technology Pioneer of The World Economic Forum
item.description: BforeAI is one of 100 leading early-stage start-ups chosen for its cutting-edge technology with the potential to improve the world.

item.title: BforeAI Named by Gartner® for Predictive Threat Intelligence
item.description: BforeAI highlighted in Gartner’s preemptive cyber defense report for predictive threat intelligence use cases that anticipate and stop attacks before they occur.

item.title: How BforeAI stopped a spear phishing attack on a leading investment firm under seven minutes - BforeAI
item.description: A global financial services firm specializing in institutional trading, investment banking, research and related brokerage services stopped an attack in its tracks with PreCrime Brand.

item.title: How to Quantify the Value of Preemptive Cybersecurity - BforeAI
item.description: Learn how you can quantify preemptive cybersecurity value. Shift from reactive 'assume breach' to a predictive approach, measuring ROI through cost reduction and averted breach costs.

item.title: How to Find Malicious Domains - BforeAI
item.description: Most often, threat actors will create a brand impersonated website to trick you or your employee into revealing sensitive data that could compromise your business and put your reputation at risk.

item.title: BforeAI Named in Four 2023 Gartner® Reports - BforeAI
item.description: Impressed by BforeAI’s predictive intelligence, Gartner® named the company in 4 reports in 2023 – including three as a sample vendor, and one as a named vendor.

item.title: BforeAI announces general availability of all PreCrime™ solutions - BforeAI
item.description: BforeAI has officially launched 4 distinct PreCrime™ solutions including predictive threat intelligence, proactive brand protection, complete adversary disruption, and automated takedown services.

item.title: Who's Behind the Screen? A Comprehensive Guide to Cyber Threat Actors - BforeAI
item.description: Often backed by government resources and funding, nation-state actors are typically motivated by political, economic, or strategic gain. On the other hand, financially-motivated criminals who seek monetary gain often engage in ransomware attacks or theft of personal and financial information.
